heading: Repealed. , (8), (10)–(12), (60), , , 88Pub. L. 93–43, § 7(a)(6)87 Stat. 82June 18, 1973
label: 281 to 282 Repealed. , (8), (10)–(12), (60), , , 88Pub. L. 93–43, § 7(a)(6)87 Stat. 82June 18, 1973
notes: Section 281, acts , ; , , , enumerated classes of persons eligible for burial in national cemeteries and provided for removal of remains. See , Veterans’ Benefits.May 14, 1948, ch. 289, § 162 Stat. 234Pub. L. 86–26073 Stat. 547section 2402 of Title 38Sept. 14, 1959
Section 281a, , , provided for utilization of surplus military real property for cemeteries.act Aug. 4, 1947, ch. 467, § 161 Stat. 742

Section 281b, , , related to utilization of surplus military real property for expansion of existing cemeteries and limited the expanded national cemetery area to six hundred and forty acres.act Aug. 4, 1947, ch. 467, § 261 Stat. 742
Section 281c, , , authorized regulations respecting utilization of surplus military real property for cemeteries.act Aug. 4, 1947, ch. 467, § 361 Stat. 742
Section 281d, , , related to utilization of surplus military real property for cemeteries at Fort Logan, Colo.act Mar. 10, 1950, ch. 52, § 164 Stat. 12
Section 281e, , , provided for selection of lands, care and maintenance, and limitation of area of national cemetery at Fort Logan, Colo.act Mar. 10, 1950, ch. 52, § 264 Stat. 12
Section 281f, , , authorized Secretary of the Army to prescribe rules and regulations for administration of national cemetery at Fort Logan, Colo.act Mar. 10, 1950, ch. 52, § 364 Stat. 12

Section 281g, , §§ 1, 2, , provided for expansion of existing cemeteries at Rock Island National Cemetery, Rock Island, Illinois, Fort Leavenworth, National Cemetery, Fort Leavenworth, Kansas, and Barrancas National Cemetery, near Pensacola, Florida.act Aug. 10, 1950, ch. 67264 Stat. 434
Section 282, , , provided for burial of Confederate veterans.act Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 355, § 137 Stat. 440

Effective Date of RepealRepeal effective , or such earlier date as the President may prescribe and publish in the Federal Register, see , set out as a note under , Veterans’ Benefits.Sept. 1, 1973section 10(c) of Pub. L. 93–43section 2306 of Title 38

L. 93–43section 7(a) of Pub. L. 93–43
